{{Quote|This is light-years ahead of all other Separatist technology!|A [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|CIS]] officer|<ref name="ITAT" />}}
The '''CIS-Advanced starfighter'''<ref name="TCWCG" /> was designed by the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]], during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].<ref name="ITAT" /> The prototype never saw any action except for a few trials.

==History==
[[File:CISAdvancedStarfighterEscapes-ItTakesAThief.jpg|thumb|left|200px|[[Saesee Tiin/Legends|Saesee Tiin]] flies away after destroying the entire [[CIS Weapons Factory|weapons factory]].]]
It was constructed in a [[CIS Weapons Factory]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Diado]]. On a mission, [[Saesee Tiin/Legends|Saesee Tiin]] stole the starfighter and destroyed the factory completely, obliterating all plans of the starfighter.<ref name="ITAT" />

{{Ship-stub}}
